page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, supported by 16.0 GB of system memory. The CPU cache configuration includes 48 KB of L1d cache, 1 MB of L2 cache, and 48 MB of L3 cache. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core capabilities are moderate, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance, Geekbench single-core scores, and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression falling into the average range. However, multi-core and memory-intensive workloads show limitations. Multi-core stress-ng, Geekbench multi-core, and passmark CPU scores are positioned in the lower tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks, along with database operations and Redis SET operations, also register in the bottom quartile.

Given these performance characteristics, the ecs.g7t.xlarge is best suited for general-purpose workloads that do not demand high multi-threaded throughput or extreme memory bandwidth. Appropriate applications include lightweight web serving, text processing, single-threaded data compression, and small-scale LLM inference tasks using smaller models. It presents a balanced hardware profile for standard utility workloads but is less optimal for heavy database operations, parallel software compilation, or complex physics simulations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, it provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance delivers moderate single-core performance, as evidenced by average scores in single-threaded compression and Geekbench single-core benchmarks. However, multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, making it less suitable for high-throughput parallel processing or heavy database operations. It is best utilized for general-purpose tasks, lightweight web serving, text processing, and small-scale language model inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 3 Gbps network baseline, optimized for moderate single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and moderate single-core performance.
tagline: A dedicated four-core general-purpose instance offering balanced memory and moderate single-threaded performance for standard utility workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Moderate performance in single-threaded compression and text processing
Best suited for general-purpose tasks, light web serving, and small LLM inference
